factory.title: Factory & Capabilities
factory.subtitle: State-of-the-art manufacturing with rigorous quality control
factory.content: Our 50,000 sqm facility houses advanced R&D labs, clean-room production environments, and comprehensive testing equipment. With over 200 engineers and ISO 9001 certified processes, we deliver precision-engineered solutions that meet the most demanding military specifications.

about.title: About Stitch Tech
about.content: Founded in 2008, Stitch Tech has grown from a specialized sewing machine manufacturer into a comprehensive defense technology provider. Our commitment to precision engineering and continuous innovation has made us a trusted partner for military contractors across 40+ countries.
